name: backthread
description: Keep the thread on what the agent shipped: Backthread captures the "why" of every session and answers "how does X work?" on a live "how it works" diagram — no diving through PRs. Provides the /backthread:capture slash command, the SessionEnd capture hook, and the backthread MCP server (capture + query).
$mcpComment: The backthread MCP server (capture + query tools), run from the plugin's BUNDLED bin via ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} (ARP-477). Declared inline so installing the plugin auto-registers the stdio server with zero PATH/npm setup — `node <plugin>/dist-bundle/backthread.js mcp`. ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} expands in mcpServers command/args (CC sets it to the plugin's install dir). The bundle is committed to git (CC runs no build step on install). Keep the plugin `version` in lockstep with cli/package.json (ARP-478 release CI enforces it).
